# dispositor

```go
import "github.com/shaobaobaoer/solarsage-mcp/pkg/dispositor"
```

Package dispositor computes dispositorship chains and final dispositors for a natal chart. The dispositor of a planet is the ruler of the sign the planet occupies. Chains reveal the flow of planetary energy.

Package dispositor computes dispositorship chains and final dispositors for natal charts. The dispositor of a planet is the ruler of the sign it occupies. Chains reveal the flow of planetary rulership.

Use CalcDispositors to get the full analysis including mutual dispositors and final dispositor detection.

<a name="Chain"></a>
## type [Chain](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/dispositor/dispositor.go#L12-L14>)

Chain represents a single dispositorship chain

```go
type Chain struct {
    Links []models.PlanetID `json:"links"`
}
```

<a name="DispositorResult"></a>
## type [DispositorResult](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/dispositor/dispositor.go#L17-L28>)

DispositorResult holds the full dispositorship analysis

```go
type DispositorResult struct {
    // Dispositors maps each planet to its dispositor (ruler of the sign it's in)
    Dispositors map[models.PlanetID]models.PlanetID `json:"dispositors"`
    // Chains are the dispositorship chains from each planet to the final dispositor
    Chains []Chain `json:"chains"`
    // FinalDispositor is the planet that disposes of itself (in its own sign), if any
    FinalDispositor *models.PlanetID `json:"final_dispositor"`
    // MutualDispositors are pairs that dispose of each other
    MutualDispositors [][2]models.PlanetID `json:"mutual_dispositors"`
    // UsesTraditionalRulers indicates which ruler system is used
    UsesTraditionalRulers bool `json:"uses_traditional_rulers"`
}
```

<a name="CalcDispositors"></a>
### func [CalcDispositors](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/dispositor/dispositor.go#L32>)

```go
func CalcDispositors(positions []models.PlanetPosition, traditional bool) *DispositorResult
```

CalcDispositors computes the dispositorship map and chains for a chart. If traditional is true, uses traditional rulers \(Mars for Scorpio, etc.\).
